title: Tender Cozy Norwegian Cream Cheese Stir-fry
description: A floral and tender dish featuring dairy-free cream cheese in a creamy and comforting sauce, perfect for a cozy evening.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add garlic cloves to the pan, sautéing for about 1 minute until fragrant.
Add broccoli florets and salt and pepper. Stir fry for about 5 minutes or until the broccoli is tender but still crisp.
In a separate bowl, mix together peanut butter and vegetable stock until smooth.
Pour the sauce over the stir-fried vegetables, and continue to cook for an additional 3-4 minutes, ensuring everything is heated through and evenly coated with the sauce.
Serve hot as a light dinner or side dish.
